name: chr19_19q13_32_APOE_CETP_region
description: 19q13.32 region containing APOE/APOC1/APOC2/APOC4 lipoprotein gene cluster, plus CETP and LIPC paralog field. Includes the strongest single common genetic risk locus for Alzheimer disease (APOE) and a major lipid-trait hub.

architecture.internal_structure: Tandem APOE/APOC1/APOC4/APOC2/CLPTM1 cluster at 65-90% identity over ~50 kb; CETP and LIPC at ~50% pairwise identity (deeper paralogs); short flanking SDs of 5-20 kb.
